sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74319" key="o)culi/paros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀξῠ-λίπᾰρος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n74319.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">composed of vinegar and oil,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τρίμμα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0515.tlg001:3:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Timocl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.2</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> ; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χυμίον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0505.tlg001:1:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sotad.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.19</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
